title: Context-Aware Snippets
description: Generate AI-powered code snippets adapted to your project's context and coding style.

snippetDescription.label: Snippet Description
snippetDescription.placeholder: Describe what you want to generate... (e.g., 'function to validate email', 'button component with loading state')

descriptions.component: React/Vue/Angular component with props and state
descriptions.function: Reusable function with parameters and return
descriptions.class: Class definition with methods and properties
descriptions.hook: Custom React hook with state and effects
descriptions.utility: Pure utility function for common tasks

language.label: Programming Language
language.autoDetectDescription: Language will be automatically detected from your project structure

errors.noProject: Please select a project to analyze its context.
errors.generic: An error occurred while generating the snippet.
